name: next-commerce-skills
description: AI agent skills for the Next Commerce platform. Each skill is a structured markdown file that any AI coding tool can load as context.

skills.name: Theme Figma Handoff
skills.description: Prepare Figma storefront designs for NEXT Commerce and Spark theme implementation by validating source structure, classifying sections and assets, recording Spark divergences, and generating a low-inference handoff for next-theme-dev.

related_skills.relationship: Downstream implementation skill that consumes the Figma handoff and performs DTL/Spark/theme edits

prerequisites: Figma file or selection links with view access
Figma MCP or REST/API access when live node inspection or screenshot export is needed

skills.name: Theme Development
skills.description: Build, modify, and debug Next Commerce storefront themes, including Spark, Intro Bootstrap, Theme Settings, ntk CLI, DTL templates, and storefront GraphQL.

related_skills.relationship: Upstream Figma source validation and handoff preparation before implementation

prerequisites: A Next Commerce store with API key (themes:read, themes:write scopes)

skills.name: Bulk Fulfillment Tracking Sync
skills.description: Update orders to Fulfilled status with tracking numbers from a CSV when a fulfillment provider's automation fails to sync back.
prerequisites: A Next Commerce store with API key (fulfillment_orders:read, fulfillment_orders:write scopes)

skills.name: Bulk Fulfillment Order Move
skills.description: Move fulfillment orders between warehouse locations in bulk — driven either by a flat file of order numbers or by a Product ID / SKU list. Handles cancellation requests for processing FOs, location discovery, and dry-run validation.
prerequisites: A Next Commerce store with API key (fulfillment_orders:read, fulfillment_orders:write, locations:read scopes)

skills.name: Bulk Subscription Actions
skills.description: Apply official subscription actions (pause, cancel) or PATCH updates (renewal date, interval, gateway, address) to a list of subscription IDs from a CSV/XLSX via the Admin API. Handles baseline selection, dry-run, rate limiting, and verification.
triggers: move renewals out by N days
prerequisites: A Next Commerce store with API key (subscriptions:write scope)

skills.name: Daily Ops Risk Scan
skills.description: Run a read-only daily operations risk scan for one Next Commerce store, finding Incomplete orders, Rejected orders, and Delivery Tracking failures or stale shipments with manual next steps.
prerequisites: A Next Commerce store with API key (orders:read plus fulfillment read access for delivery statuses)

skills.name: New Campaign Setup
skills.description: End-to-end setup for a new CPK campaign — scaffolds the project, copies a starter template, seeds campaigns.json, downloads CLAUDE.md, then wires up config.js and campaigns.json with API key, store details, and analytics in one pass.

canonical_context.role: Public catalog entry for CPK setup only

related_skills.relationship: Canonical public Campaigns OS lifecycle skill
Canonical public Campaigns OS build skill
Canonical public Campaigns OS QA skill

prerequisites: A CPK project root (sellmore.campaigns.cpk or equivalent)
Campaign Cart API key for the store
CPK_ROOT environment variable or path to campaign root
